name: Nunemunthala Rachana
about: Nunemunthala Rachana is a Cybersecurity graduate passionate about Security Operations Center (SOC), threat detection, incident response, SIEM, and AI-driven security automation. She enjoys building practical cybersecurity solutions and continuously improving her blue-team skills.
education: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Cybersecurity), Institute of Aeronautical Engineering, Hyderabad
experience: Hands-on experience building SOC projects using Splunk, Wazuh, MITRE ATT&CK, Python, and AI technologies. Completed cybersecurity internships and practical labs focused on threat detection, log analysis, vulnerability assessment, and incident response.
career_goal: Seeking an entry-level SOC Analyst (L1) or Blue Team role where she can contribute to threat monitoring, incident response, SIEM operations, and continuous security improvement.

projects.name: AI-Powered SOC Assistant
projects.description: Built an AI-powered SOC platform integrating Splunk logs, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, IOC extraction, incident report generation, and threat analysis.

projects.name: PhishCatcher
projects.description: Developed an AI-based phishing URL detection platform using Machine Learning algorithms and Flask with secure user authentication.

projects.name: SOC Home Lab
projects.description: Created a SOC lab using Wazuh, Ubuntu, Windows, Kali Linux, and Splunk for log monitoring, alert analysis, and incident investigation.

achievements: Strong hands-on experience with SIEM technologies
